 Unfortunately it is not that easy: iconv stuff must be fixed too
 and I am working on that.  There are more problems with slave
 ports, but update to 4.82 that makes mail/exim to work on all
 released systems is a priority, so slave ports will be fixed
 after it.
 
 Sorry for being sooo slow.
 --=20
